info.title: Enterprise Project Management System
info.description: Production-ready FastAPI backend with workflow automation and AI integration

post.description: OAuth2 compatible token login, get an access token for future requests

get.description: Get investments with filtering and pagination

schema.title: Response Get Investments Api Investments  Get
Response Get Investment Tasks Api Investments  Investment Id  Tasks Get
Response Get My Tasks Api Investments Tasks My Tasks Get

post.summary: Create Risk or Issue for Investment

get.summary: Get All Risks & Issues for an Investment
get.description: Retrieve all risks and issues associated with a specific investment, with pagination.

schema.title: Response Read Risks Issues For Investment Api Risks Issues Investments  Investment Id  Get

get.summary: Get a Specific Risk or Issue
get.description: Retrieve a specific risk or issue by its unique ID.

put.description: Update the details of a specific risk or issue.

delete.description: Delete a specific risk or issue from the database.

get.description:
Get current workflow state for an idea
Returns current step, allowed actions, responsible roles/teams

post.description:
Perform a workflow action on an idea
Validates permissions, updates idea status, workflow instance, and logs history

get.description: Get workflow history for an idea

schema.title: Response Get Idea Workflow History Api Workflow Idea  Idea Id  History Get

get.description: Get available workflow actions for a user on a specific entity
Get workflow tasks assigned to the current user

post.description: Upload a document to an investment

get.description: Get all documents for an investment

schema.title: Response Get Investment Documents Api Documents  Investment Id  Documents Get

get.description: Get documents uploaded by the current user

schema.title: Response Get My Documents Api Documents My Documents Get

get.description: Get storage statistics for user's documents

post.description: Upload multiple documents to an investment

schema.title: Response Get Conversations Api Ai Services  Get
Response Get Conversation Messages Api Ai Services  Conversation Id  Messages Get

post.description: Send a message and get AI response
Triggers the generation of a report for a given investment.

schema.title: Response Get Message Feedback Api Ai Services Messages  Message Id  Feedback Get

get.description: Get conversation statistics for the user
Retrieve notifications for a specific user.

schema.title: Response Read User Notifications Api Notifications User  User Id  Get

get.description: Retrieve a single notification by its ID.

patch.description: Update the status of a notification (e.g., to READ or ARCHIVED).
Mark a specific notification target as read.

ReportGenerationRequest.description: Request schema for generating a report.
